---
title: "Trees"
author: "Casey Martin"
date: "2024-11-18"
output: pdf_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(knitr)
library(rpart.plot)
library(vip)
```

```{r}
# Remove unnescessary columns
dataset_spread <- dataset_spread %>% select(-id, -category, -bedrooms, -cityname, -state, -source)
```

# Train test split
```{r}
set.seed(445)

dataset_split <- initial_split(dataset_spread)
dataset_train <- training(dataset_split)
dataset_test <- testing(dataset_split)
```

# Random Forest

```{r}
set.seed(445)

rf_spec <- rand_forest(mtry = sqrt(.cols())) |>
  set_engine("randomForest", importance = TRUE) |>
  set_mode("regression")

rf_fit <- rf_spec |>
  fit(price ~ ., data = dataset_train)

bind_cols(
  augment(rf_fit, new_data = dataset_test),
  predict(rf_fit, new_data = dataset_test)
) -> dataset_pred_rf

MSE <- (1/length(dataset_pred_rf$price))*(sum(dataset_test$price - dataset_pred_rf$.pred...21))^2
MSE
```
